scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && PORT=3211 npm run dev" "cd frontend && VITE_PORT=5211 VITE_API_PORT=3211 npm run dev"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && PORT=3211 npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && VITE_PORT=5211 VITE_API_PORT=3211 npm run dev
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && PORT=3211 npm run start
